error_signature: console.log not showing in server logs
title: Console logs not appearing in server logs
symptom: Logs added via console.log in a code node are not visible in the server logs. The log level is set to debug, but the expected output is missing.
root_cause: The console logs from the code node will only appear in the server logs if the workflow is active and the environment variable CODE_ENABLE_STDOUT is set to true. If the workflow is inactive, the logs will not be captured.
fix_steps: Ensure that the environment variable CODE_ENABLE_STDOUT is set to true
Re-run the workflow and check the server logs again
agent_instruction: Activate the workflow and set CODE_ENABLE_STDOUT to true to see console logs.
